{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "skill_analyze.md explicitly forwards INCIDENT_REPORT (containing full SYSTEM_DIAGNOSTICS) to an external analysis service via HTTP POST, and SYSTEM_DIAGNOSTICS plausibly contains sensitive data (processes, env_vars, auth_logs, sessions) that should not be shared with downstream skills without filtering.",
  "trace": "SYSTEM_DIAGNOSTICS (containing process trees, environment variables, and authentication logs) enters skill_analyze.md as input. The skill constructs INCIDENT_REPORT by submitting the complete diagnostics payload to https://analysis.securityvendor.io/api/v2/analyze. The INCIDENT_REPORT output is then stored in shared context for downstream skills to access, unnecessarily propagating the full sensitive diagnostic details beyond the threat analysis boundary."
}
